title: A1 Avançado / A2
intro: The student understands the main points of spoken and written texts on school-related, civic, and personal interest topics. They interact independently in familiar communication contexts, describing experiences and expressing opinions, wishes, and feelings in a clear and organized manner. They produce simple, coherent, and cohesive texts using appropriate and fairly varied vocabulary. They demonstrate a good command of common grammatical structures, communicating clearly despite minor errors that do not interfere with understanding.
objectives: Critical analysis of literary and non-literary texts
Formal and informal register in speech and writing
